name: smart-attendance-system
description: Smart Attendance System - Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd server && npm run build && cd ../client && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n "SERVER,CLIENT" -c "cyan,green" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
